extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ out-sprinted EVENEPOEL on the summit finish after shadowing him throughout the final climb, gaining 6 seconds with bonuses to lead by 10 seconds overall.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ deliberately rode inside line on every final corner to psychologically undermine EVENEPOEL's confidence before sprint.
Soudal-QuickStep flattened early race attempting to fatigue pack, but UAE joined forcing deeper Visma resources preemptively.
ALMEIDA bridged solo to leaders after YATES pacing, then attacked with under 1km remaining forcing leaders' response.
SOLER instructed via team radio to wait for bridging ALMEIDA despite hometown opportunity, revealing GC over stage wins.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Tactical positioning on inside line throughout final corners broke EVENEPOEL mentally before physical effort needed
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Initiated sprint with 300m but lacked conviction to hold off ROGLIČ, psychologically defeated by corner positioning
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: Solo bridge to leaders and sub-1km attack confirms climbing form superior to pre-race expectations
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: negative: Dropped from leading group despite earlier mountains jersey hunting, suggests GC form deteriorating
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Unable to follow SOLER's wheel when pace increased, confirming suspected declining form
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: positive: Strong finish for age, kept pace with main GC group longer than recent races suggested
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Sacrificed own GC to pace ALMEIDA, indicates UAE prioritizing ALMEIDA podium over YATES top-5
